---
name: Persona contribution
about: Propose a new reviewer persona for the bench
labels: persona
---

## Role

The role archetype you are proposing (for example: Chief Sustainability Officer, internal audit, a regulator lens, an industry-specific buyer).

## Why this lens is missing

The board and bench already cover sixteen personas (seven board roles plus nine bench roles). What does this reviewer catch that none of the existing sixteen would? Name the kind of finding only this lens surfaces.

## Archetype confirmation

- [ ] This persona is a role archetype, not a real named individual, and is not derived from any one person's profile
- [ ] It contains no organisation-specific facts (those belong in a user's private `org-profile.md`)

## Six-section checklist

The persona file follows `skills/executive-review/review-board/references/persona-template.md` and fills in all six sections:

- [ ] MANDATE
- [ ] WHAT I PROBE FIRST
- [ ] RED FLAGS
- [ ] WHAT CONVINCES ME
- [ ] VOCABULARY AND TONE
- [ ] KNOWN BLIND SPOTS (mandatory, written against the persona; the red-team stage depends on it)
